<!-- Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible. -->

<!-- Have you considered any alternative approaches? If so, why did you choose this one? -->

## 👥 Affected User Role(s)

<!-- Which roles does this feature affect? -->

## 📊 Priority / Impact

<!-- How important is this feature? -->
- [ ] Critical — blocks core workflows
- [ ] High — significantly improves experience
- [ ] Medium — nice to have
- [ ] Low — minor improvement

## 📋 Additional Context

<!-- Add any mockups, screenshots, or references that help explain the feature. -->
